claim_bullets.bullet_text: The examples in JavaScript Allongé were tested using transpilers like Google Traceur Compiler and Babel (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.289-290).
Both Traceur and Babel are transpilers that parse ECMAScript 2015 code and emit valid ECMAScript-5 code (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.289-290).
To see the result of expressions, you may need to use the console in your web browser, for example, using console.log() (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.289-290).

source_record_text: This section explains how to run the examples from JavaScript Allongé, which were tested using transpilers like Google Traceur Compiler and Babel to convert ECMAScript 2015 code into ECMAScript-5 code.
